ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize */,
  "category_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the prize category */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Sort order of the prize */,
  "portion" TEXT /* Portion of the prize awarded to the laureate */,
  "prize_amount" INTEGER /* Original prize amount */,
  "prize_amount_adjusted" INTEGER /* Adjusted prize amount */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the prize was awarded */,
  "prize_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize (e.g., received, declined) */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation for the prize */,
  "category_top_motivation" TEXT /* Top motivation for the category */,
  "award_link" TEXT /* Link to the prize's Nobel Prize page */,
  "prize_image" TEXT /* Image of the prize */,
  "prize_video" TEXT /* Video of the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the organization */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the organization */,
  "org_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_city" TEXT /* City where the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_city_now" TEXT /* Current name of the city where the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_continent" TEXT /* Continent where the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_country_now" TEXT /* Current name of the country where the organization was founded */,
  "org_founded_location_string" TEXT /* String describing the organization's founding location */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Laureate's job title at the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Laureate's department at the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliations_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residence address */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date at the residence */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date at the residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the residence */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal the publication was published in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "award_entity" TEXT /* Entity that awarded the prize */,
  "award_link" TEXT /* Link to the award's page */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., research, activism) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_prizes" (
  "laureate_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-prize relationship */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_contributions" (
  "laureate_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-contribution relationship */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_contributions_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_publications" (
  "laureate_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-publication relationship */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_awards" (
  "laureate_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-award relationship */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Nobel Committee, Selection Committee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_committee_members" (
  "committee_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee member */,
  "member_position" TEXT /* Position of the committee member (e.g., Chair, Secretary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES prize_committees ("committee_id")
)
column_names: Full name of the prize category
